structured_payload_candidate.title: Active Endpoints Based on Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The active endpoints for primary airflow setpoint vary with Zone Group mode: cooling maximum is Vcool-max in Occupied, Cooldown, Setup; 0 in Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied. Minimum is Vmin in Occupied; 0 in all other modes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set cooling maximum endpoint to Vcool-max in Occupied, Cooldown, Setup; 0 in Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied. Set minimum endpoint to Vmin in Occupied; 0 in Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Table 5.9.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0

evidence_quote:
Table 5.9.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool -max Vcool -max Vcool -max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling State Primary Airflow Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is Cooling, map cooling-loop output to active primary airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature > room temperature, limit setpoint to minimum endpoint. Heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling-loop output to active primary airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature from air handler is greater than room temperature, active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint. Heating coil is OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. The cooling -loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint .
1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint .
b. Heating coil is OFF.

evidence_quote:
a. The cooling -loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint .
1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint .
b. Heating coil is OFF.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband State Primary Airflow Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is Deadband, active primary airflow setpoint is the minimum endpoint. Heating coil is OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active primary airflow setpoint to the minimum endpoint. Heating coil is OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint .
b. Heating coil is OFF.

evidence_quote:
a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint .
b. Heating coil is OFF.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating State Primary Airflow and Discharge Temperature Control
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is Heating, active primary airflow setpoint is the minimum endpoint. Heating loop resets discharge temperature from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Heating coil modulates to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active primary airflow setpoint to the minimum endpoint. Reset discharge temperature from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Modulate heating coil to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
b. The heating -loop shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint .
c. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint . (Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

evidence_quote:
a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
b. The heating -loop shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint .
c. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint . (Directly controlling heating off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

structured_payload_candidate.title: VAV Damper Control
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured airflow at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate VAV damper to maintain measured airflow at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured airflow at setpoint .

evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated to maintain the measured airflow at setpoint .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Control
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating or cooling, or Zone Group is in Occupied Mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Run fan. Before starting fan, drive damper fully closed. After fan proven ON for 15 seconds, release damper override.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State , or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode . Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.

evidence_quote: Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State , or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode . Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Primary Airflow Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 4 alarm if measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0. Generate Level 3 alarm if measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0. Suppress alarms if zone Importance-Multiplier is 0 for static pressure reset T&R loop.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow less than threshold of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm at 70% threshold, Level 3 alarm at 50% threshold. Suppress if Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R loop.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes (Level 4); measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes (Level 3)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote:
a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low-Discharge Air Temperature Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON, and DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate Level 4 alarm. If DAT is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate Level 3 alarm. Suppress if zone Importance-Multiplier is 0 for hot-water reset T&R loop.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating hot-water plant proven ON and DAT below setpoint by threshold for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm at 8.3°C (15°F) below setpoint, Level 3 alarm at 17°C (30°F) below setpoint. Suppress if Importance-Multiplier = 0 for hot-water reset T&R loop.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: DAT 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes (Level 4); DAT 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes (Level 3)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.
b. If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its hot-water reset T&R control loop, low -DAT alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote:
a. If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.
b. If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
c. If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its hot-water reset T&R control loop, low -DAT alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan alarm if status input differs from output command after 15 seconds. Commanded ON, status OFF: Level 2. Commanded OFF, status ON: Level 4.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Status input different from output command after 15 seconds
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 2 alarm if commanded ON and status OFF; Level 4 alarm if commanded OFF and status ON.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Commanded ON, status OFF (Level 2); Commanded OFF, status ON (Level 4)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Fan alarm is indicated by the status input being different from the output command after a period of 15 seconds after a change in output status.
a. Commanded ON, status OFF: Level 2
b. Commanded OFF, status ON: Level 4

evidence_quote:
Fan alarm is indicated by the status input being different from the output command after a period of 15 seconds after a change in output status.
a. Commanded ON, status OFF: Level 2
b. Commanded OFF, status ON: Level 4

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If fan is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan OFF and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading above threshold while fan OFF for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes , generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes , generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while fan is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position 0%, airflow > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes, fan proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper closed but airflow above threshold while fan ON for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Valve Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If valve position is 0% for 15 minutes, and DAT is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Valve position 0% for 15 minutes and DAT > AHU SAT + 3°C (5°F)
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Valve closed but DAT above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F) for 15 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the valve position is 0% for 15 minutes , and DAT is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the valve position is 0% for 15 minutes , and DAT is above AHU SAT by 3°C (5°F), generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches interlocked to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin; force damper full closed/open; force heating to ON/closed; turn fan ON/OFF; and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Provide software switches for overrides: force airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin; force damper full closed/open; force heating ON/closed; turn fan ON/OFF; reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, force damper full closed/open, force heating to ON/closed, turn fan ON/OFF, and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero ,
b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool -max,
c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin ,
d. force damper full closed/open ,
e. force heating to ON/closed ,
f. turn fan ON/OFF, and
g. reset request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section ).

evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero ,
b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool -max,
c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin ,
d. force damper full closed/open ,
e. force heating to ON/closed ,
f. turn fan ON/OFF, and
g. reset request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section ).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send cooling SAT reset requests based on zone temperature deviation from cooling setpoint and cooling loop output: 3 requests if zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes after suppression; 2 requests if exceeds by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes after suppression; 1 request if Cooling Loop > 95% until < 85%; 0 requests if Cooling Loop < 95%.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature deviation from cooling setpoint or cooling loop output
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 3 requests if Tzone > Tcool-set + 3°C (5°F) for 2 min after suppression; 2 requests if Tzone > Tcool-set + 2°C (3°F) for 2 min after suppression; 1 request if Cooling Loop > 95% until < 85%; 0 requests if Cooling Loop < 95%.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20 , send 3 requests.
b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20 , send 2 requests.
c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%.
d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote:
a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20 , send 3 requests.
b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20 , send 2 requests.
c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%.
d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
